treatment_information.treatment_response: Reduced body temperature and serum LDH concentration

treatment_information.specific_treatment: R-CODOX-M/IVAC (rituximab, cyclophosphamide, vincristine, doxorubicin, methotrexate alternated with ifosfamide, etoposide, high-dose cytarabine)
treatment_information.treatment_response: Transient elevation of hepatobiliary enzyme levels after first cycle, severe liver injury after second cycle

treatment_timeline.event: Started R-CHOP chemotherapy for non-Hodgkin lymphoma
Diagnosed with double-hit lymphoma (DHL) after 2 cycles of R-CHOP
Transient elevation of hepatobiliary enzyme levels after first cycle of R-CODOX-M
Severe liver injury after second cycle of R-CODOX-M/IVAC
Liver biopsy performed showing sinusoidal dilatation and congestion
Treated with nafamostat mesilate, glycyrrhizic acid, and ursodeoxycholic acid
Admitted to intensive care unit and received ventilator support

patient_outcome.final_status: Deceased due to respiratory failure from CMV pneumonia
patient_outcome.complications: Hepatic sinusoidal obstruction syndrome (SOS), CMV pneumonia
